prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWK-TT-HOTGLUESTICKS-12PC-CLEAR Product Type: BONDING_ADHESIVES Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 4 Inch Clear Mini Glue Gun Hot Glue Sticks, Crafting Supplies, 12pcs Description: A crafting supplies and hobby tools essential. If you need a refill of 4 inch hot glue sticks for crafting, DIY and other creative projects, ToolTreaux's 12 pack of hot glue sticks are suitable for both high and low temperature glue guns, and work with and for a wide range of materials and creative projects. Ideally used in conjunction with a smaller glue gun (10 watt).

The 4 inch hot glue sticks are easy to install and quick to warm, so you can continue crafting and creating in just a matter of minutes. And, setting in about 30 to 60 seconds, the hot glue sticks feature strong and durable adhesive properties and will dry, set and harden with a completely clear bond.

Whether it's art and crafts, basic repairs around the house, jewelry design, kids art projects and more, the hot glue sticks are handy to have as extra refills for all your crafting projects.
Sold as a pack of 12 units. Search Terms: hobby tools arts and crafts hobbyist art sewing quilting crafting creative design origami clear glue home jewelry design repair craft glue construction paper fabric pottery hot melt adhesive bond thermoplastic kids activities scrapbooking stationery Features: - MINI GLUE GUN HOT GLUE STICKS: If you need a refill on 4 inch glue sticks for crafting, DIY and other creative projects, ToolTreaux's 12 pack of glue gun glue sticks are suitable for both high and low temperature glue guns and work with a wide range of materials - CRAFTING SUPPLIES MUST HAVE: Whether it's art and crafts, basic repairs, jewelry design, kids art projects and more, the glue stick refills are handy to have as extra refills for all kinds of crafting projects; ideally used with a 10 watt glue gun - QUICK MELT GLUE STICKS: The 4 inch refill hot glue sticks for a glue gun are easy to install and quick to warm, so you can continue crafting and creating in just a matter of minutes - COMPLETELY CLEAR BOND: Setting in about 30 to 60 seconds, the hot glue sticks feature strong and durable adhesive properties and will dry, set and harden with a completely clear bond - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4 x 0.27 inches; Color: Clear; Weight: 1.8 ounces; Sold as a pack of 12 units === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 12-Pack 4 Inch Clear Hot Glue Sticks

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 12-Pk 4-Inch Clear Mini Glue Gun Hot Glue Sticks

tokens.name: Mini Glue Gun Hot Glue Sticks

anthropic.title_differentiation: Mini Glue Gun Refills, High And Low Temperature Compatible, Quick Melt, Strong Clear Bond, 30-60 Second Set Time

openai.title_differentiation: Fast Melt, Clear Strong Bond, High And Low Temp, 4 Inch Mini Refills, Ideal For Crafts And Repairs
